description_long: This object is a modern kitchen range hood, designed to be mounted above a cooking area to ventilate and filter air. The front face features a large metallic mesh filter, likely made of stainless steel, for trapping grease and particulates. Two circular LED lights are symmetrically positioned on either side of the control panel, providing illumination for the cooking surface below. The control panel, located centrally above the filter, consists of several physical buttons for adjusting fan speed and lighting. The body is primarily constructed from black metal or coated steel, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, indicating that this appliance is intended to be installed flush against a wall or within cabinetry.
description: A sleek, black metal kitchen range hood with a central mesh filter, two LED lights, and a button control panel. Designed for wall or cabinet mounting above a stove.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mesh filter, two LED lights, and the button control panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and boxy profile of the range hood, with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, featureless back panel, indicating wall or cabinet mounting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the left side with a plain, boxy profile.
